{"inp":{"code":"price = 28.63
shares = 950_846_732
market_cap = price * shares

# 2024 numbers (consolidated)
net_revenue = 4_002_104_000
gross_profit = 2_907_131_000
ebit = 1_941_517_000
da = 172_056_000
net_income = 1_859_906_000
assets = 30_689_036_000
ca = 6_244_064_000
cl = 3_053_989_000
cash = 807_229_000
fornecedores = 45_654_000
liquidity_ratio = (ca - cl) / cl
working_capital = ca - cl
vcash = cash
# compute derived metrics
ebitda = ebit + da
LPA = net_income / shares
VPA = (equity := 11_723_503_000) / shares
P_L = price / LPA
P_VP = price / VPA
P_EBIT = price / (ebit / shares)
PSR = price / (net_revenue / shares)
P_Ativos = price / (assets / shares)
P_CapGiro = price / (working_capital / shares)
P_AtivCircLiq = price / (working_capital / shares)  # same as Cap Giro here
EV = market_cap + (net_debt := (2_143_632_000 + 9_676_884_000) - cash)
ev_ebitda = EV / (ebitda)
ev_ebit = EV / ebit
LPA = net_income / shares
VPA = equity / shares
Marg_bruta = gross_profit / net_revenue
Marg_EBIT = ebit / net_revenue
Marg_liquida = net_income / net_revenue
EBIT_atv = ebit / assets
ROIC = ebit / (assets - fornecedores - cash)
ROE = net_income / equity
Liquidez_corr = (ca - cl) / cl
DivBrPtom = (net_debt := (2_143_632_000 + 9_676_884_000 ) ) / equity
Giro_Ativos = net_revenue / assets

print("Market Cap:", market_cap)
print("EV:", EV)
print("LPA:", LPA)
print("VPA:", VPA)
print("P/L:", P_L)
print("P/VP:", P_VP)
print("P/EBIT:", P_EBIT)

print("P/Ativos:", P_Ativos)
print("P/Cap.Giro:", P_CapGiro)
print("EV/EBITDA:", ev_ebtda if (ev_ebtda := EV / ebitda) else None)
print("EV/EBIT:", ev_ebit)
print("Marg Bruta:", Marg_bruta)
print("Marg EBIT:", Marg_EBIT)
print("Marg Liquida:", Marg_liquida)
print("EBIT/Ativo:", EBIT_atv)
print("ROIC:", ROIC)
print("ROE:", ROE)
print("Liquidez Corr:", Liquidez_corr)
print("Giro Ativos:", Giro_Ativos)
"} }
